title: Start a new chat session and receive the first AI follow-up via Enter submit
description: Verifies that a first-time visitor can load the chat, submit an answer with Enter, see a loading state, and receive an AI follow-up in the same thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the loading state to appear
Verify a new AI message is displayed after the user message

title: Submit an answer via Send button and continue a 3-turn conversation in one session
description: Verifies that a user can submit via the Send control and continue the conversation for at least three turns without losing prior messages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Click the send control
Wait for the AI response to appear
Fill a second free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the AI response to appear
Fill a third free-text answer into the chat input field
Click the send control
Verify multiple turns of user and AI messages are present in a single continuous thread

title: Loading state appears while awaiting an AI response and clears afterward
description: Verifies that after submitting an answer the UI shows a waiting/loading indicator and then returns to a normal state once the AI message is rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the loading state to appear
Verify the loading state is no longer shown after the AI response is displayed

title: Refinement loop updates the AI follow-up after the user changes their answer
description: Verifies that after an AI follow-up, the user can refine their answer and the AI provides an updated follow-up in the same conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the AI response to appear
Fill a refined answer that changes key details into the chat input field
Press Enter
Verify a new AI follow-up message is displayed after the refined answer

title: Pressing Enter sends exactly one message and does not double-submit
description: Verifies that using Enter to submit results in a single user message and a single AI response rather than duplicated turns.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Press Enter
Wait for the AI response to appear
Verify the latest user turn appears only once and the latest AI reply appears only once

title: Message order remains correct with user message followed by AI response
description: Verifies that after sending an answer, the UI orders messages correctly with the user message appearing before the corresponding AI reply.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Click the send control
Wait for the AI response to appear
Verify the most recent user message appears immediately before the most recent AI message in the thread

title: Chat scrolls to keep the latest message visible after multiple turns
description: Verifies that after several turns, the conversation view keeps the newest messages visible without manual scrolling.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill a free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the AI response to appear
Fill a second free-text answer into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the AI response to appear
Verify the latest AI message is visible in the conversation viewport

title: Prevent whitespace-only messages from being submitted
description: Verifies that submitting an empty or whitespace-only answer is blocked and no new user message is added to the thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the chat interface to be ready
Fill whitespace-only text into the chat input field
Press Enter
Verify no new user message is added to the message list
